Params: {1: '1', 3: 'As the "banquet" begins, the townsfolk with their vacant stares start moving with shambling, unsteady steps.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Approaching Veronica, they seemingly try to escort her to partake of the so-called "sacrifice."'}
{3: 'In their addled minds, they are escorting the "Bloodthirsty Siren", who does not fear the Mist and will grant them protection.'}
{3: 'As long as the Siren accepts their worship and devours the blood offering, they will be granted eternal peace in return.'}
{2: 'Mad Townsfolk', 3: 'We... have waited... for the Siren... for far too long...', 4: '1', 5: '2', 6: '3'}
{3: 'Only an uncanny glow remains in their eyes.'}
{3: 'They no longer hold the reverence they once held for their sheriff, but the madness of yearning for the Siren\'s arrival.'}
{3: 'As you rush toward the unconscious Eileena, Veronica throws herself between you and the maddened townsfolk, shielding you with her own body.'}

{1: '1', 3: 'Countless shadow creatures emerge from all directions, surging like a tide toward the sleeping girl. Just as they are about to reach her, you throw yourself forward, shielding her beneath your body.'}
{3: 'Meanwhile, the mastermind behind it all watches with cold, unfeeling eyes.'}
{1: '1', 2: '"Roko"', 3: 'The sinner who dares interrupt our feast...', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Veronica', 3: 'Get her out of here! I\'ll handle this!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She smashes through the banquet hall\'s towering windows and shoves Eileena and you through the opening.'}
{3: 'The sheriff of yore charges alone into this twisted feast.'}
{3: 'No matter how much she refuses to accept it, she knows full well that those bodies no longer hold any trace of the human mind.'}
{3: 'And now, it is time for her to end this nightmare with her own hands.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'A young man steps forward from the crowd, walking straight toward Veronica.'}
{2: '???', 3: 'They simply wish to show you their loyalty, Sheriff Veronica.', 4: '15'}
{3: 'A familiar voice calls out... one that belongs to someone who should no longer exist in this world.'}
{3: 'She sees the face of her former deputy staring back at her.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'But now, that face is devoid of any spark of life, stiff as cold, rigid plaster.'}
{2: '"Aleksei"', 3: 'Because this is your destiny... Bloodthirsty Siren.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'After a moment of silence, she raises the lance in her hands determinedly, pointing it at Aleksei.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The pale-faced young man pays no heed to her words and takes another step forward.'}
{3: 'She grits her teeth, grips her lance tight, and strikes down at that face so familiar yet so alien.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The lance\'s blade pierces through the air, tearing the young man\'s plaster-pale limbs, but he continues forward with mechanical steps.'}
{3: 'With each step he takes, the cracks at his wounds grow wider, his pale muscle twitching grotesquely as if some force within is pushing outward.'}
{3: 'But what pours from the body is not blood, but rat after rat.'}
{3: 'More and more rats surge from the young man\'s body, quickly piling up on the ground in a writhing, twisted mass.'}
{3: 'Aleksei\'s life ended long ago, but those rats now serve as his muscles and veins, driving this decaying, hollow shell.'}
{3: 'The vessel that once housed vibrant life has become a playground for the filthy.'}
{3: 'But an eerie smile still lingers on that lifeless face.'}
{3: 'He opens his mouth and lets out fragmented, broken ravings.'}
{2: '"Aleksei"', 3: 'So you may become... the true... Bloodthirsty Siren...', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'His voice grows fainter and fainter, until it finally fades away completely.'}
{3: 'Meanwhile, more and more rats flee from his body until only pale skin and flesh remain.'}
{3: 'As the last rat escapes, the final trace of "life" that briefly lingered in his body vanishes.'}
{3: 'His body begins to dissolve, his pale and bloodless limbs melting like wax and transforming into sinister shadows.'}
{3: 'As if seeking their true vessel, the shadows wriggle and thrash as they approach Veronica like living tentacles.'}
{3: 'The lance\'s strikes fail to weaken the shadows\' advance, and they coil around the weapon before quickly spreading across Veronica\'s body.'}
{3: 'As the shadows seep into her skin, a sharp pain pierces through her mind.'}
{1: 'Once again, she hears that strange sound she has heard so many times before.', 3: '55', 6: '1'}
{2: 'Once again, she hears that strange sound she has heard so many times before.'}
